claims.contract_reference: Cigna Provider Agreement, Exhibit A, effective 2025-10-01: Cardiology diagnostic studies at 95% of MPFS (global). Provider owns equipment and bills globally. 2026 MPFS global rate for CPT 93306: $442.11. Expected at 95%: $420.00. Payer paid $210.00 — applied professional-component-only rate due to modifier -26, but global billing is correct.
claims.underpayment_rationale: Payer treated modifier -26 (professional component) as present on claim and paid only the professional component rate ($210). Provider bills globally — owns the echo equipment and performs interpretation. Modifier -26 was not on the submitted claim. CO-97 applied in error; global rate of $420.00 is correct.
claims.dispute_address: Cigna Provider Disputes, Attn: Payment Integrity, P.O. Box 188004, Chattanooga TN 37422

claims.contract_reference: Anthem Blue Cross Provider Agreement, Exhibit B, Section 4, effective 2026-01-01: General surgery at 90% of MPFS. 2026 MPFS rate for CPT 47562: $10,889.00. Expected at 90%: $9,800.00. COB reduction applied incorrectly — eligibility verification confirmed single coverage, no secondary payer.
claims.underpayment_rationale: CO-22 COB adjustment applied in error. Provider verified patient eligibility prior to surgery — Anthem is the only active coverage. No secondary payer exists. Payer reduced payment to $4,100 as if a secondary had paid a primary balance. Full contracted rate of $9,800 is owed.
